title: Paint The World As You See (PWAYS)
description: Click on blocks and items with special item, open textures or models in external programs immediately. Enjoy the convenience!
body: The mod adds two brushes: one for textures and one for models. Clicking on a block or an item in your off hand opens the editor specified in the config (for example, blockbench and aseprite). The opened texture or model is transferred to an auto-generated resource pack called _\_\_repainted___. Enjoy the convenience!
